chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.S-168 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 13.05.2025 Mr. Fareeda Naz Advocate along with petitioners. ASI Allah Bachayo Khaskheli I/c PP Seerani PS Badin on behalf of SSP Badin and SHO PS Badin. -.-.-. Respondents No.2 and 3 have filed their comments and have stated that no harassment to the present petitioners has been caused by the official Respondents. They have also stated in their comments that they will act strictly in accordance with law and will provide protection to the petitioners if they approached. In light of the above statements filed by the police officials this matter stands disposed off. J U D G E Ali Haider
